creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Opera has relased a Security update

Fixed a moderately severe issue, as reported by Attila Suszter; details will be disclosed at a later date.

http://www.opera.com/security/advisory/1046
http://www.opera.com/security/advisory/1047

Fix: The Patch solves the prtoblems.
	Build with pkg_jail

	Package tested on 8.3 i386 and amd64
	Flashplugin may work only after reboot.
